label: GrabCar
notes: Standard GrabCar sedan. High trip frequency short distance.

label: Grab Premium/Exec
notes: 7-seat MPV for GrabExec. Fewer trips longer distance.

label: GrabExec Premium (D9 vs Alphard)
notes: Premium MPV. EV premium auto-calculated from vehicle price gap. Larger DC charger needed.

label: GrabBike / GrabFood Delivery
notes: High frequency short trips. Cheaper charger hardware.

label: GrabBike Premium
notes: Premium scooter segment. Same trip profile as commuter bike.
